privacy.title: Politika tal-Privatezza
privacy.s1Text: Uplift ("we", "our", or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Politika tal-Privatezza explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our workforce intelligence platform.
privacy.s2aText: We Mejju collect Personali information Dak you provide directly, including:
privacy.s2aItem1: Isem, email address, and phone number
privacy.s2aItem2: Employment Dettalji (job Titlu, Dipartiment, work Post)
privacy.s2bText: We automatically collect certain information Meta you use the Service:
privacy.s3Text: We use the information we collect lil:
privacy.s3Item2: Proċess scheduling U workforce management functions
privacy.s3Item3: Ibgħat notifications about xiftijiet, time off, and opportunities
privacy.s3Item4: Generate Analitika U Insights għal your Organizzazzjoni
privacy.s3Item5: Improve our Service U develop Ġdid features
privacy.s3Item6: Communicate B' you about updates U Sapport
privacy.s4Text: We Mejju Aqsam your information B':
privacy.s4Item1Text: As the platform is provided lil organizations, your employer has Aċċess lil work-related Data
privacy.s4Item2Text: Third parties Min assist us fi operating the Service (e.g., cloud hosting, Ħlas Qed jipproċessa)
privacy.s4Item3Text: Meta Meħtieġ minn law Jew lil protect our rights
privacy.s4NoSell: We do Mhux sell your Personali information lil third parties.
privacy.s5Text: We implement appropriate technical U organizational measures lil protect your Personali information, including:
privacy.s5Item1: Encryption minn data in transit and at rest
privacy.s5Item2: Regolari Sigurtà assessments U penetration testing
privacy.s6Text: We retain your Personali information għal as long as necessary lil provide the Service U fulfill the purposes outlined fi Dan Politika, unless a longer retention period is Meħtieġ minn law.
privacy.s7Text: Jekk you are fi the European Economic Area, you have the Tajjeb lil:
privacy.s7Item1Text: Talba a copy minn your personal data
privacy.s7Item3Text: Talba deletion minn your data ("right to be forgotten")
privacy.s7Item4Text: Irċievi your Data fi a machine-readable Format
privacy.s7Item5Text: Object to certain processing minn your data
privacy.s7Contact: Sa exercise Dawn rights, Kuntatt us f' privacy@getuplift.io Jew use the self-service Għażliet fi your Kont Settings.
privacy.s8Text: We use cookies U Simili tracking technologies lil Isegwi Attività fuq our Service. Dawn are used għal Awtentikazzjoni, preferences, U Analitika. You can control cookie Settings Minn your Browser.
privacy.s9Text: Your information may be transferred to and processed in countries other than your country minn residence. We ensure appropriate safeguards are in place for such transfers in compliance with applicable data protection laws.
privacy.s10Text: Our Service is Mhux directed lil individuals Taħt 16. We do Mhux knowingly collect Personali information Minn children Taħt 16.
privacy.s11Text: We may update this Politika tal-Privatezza from time to time. We will notify you minn any changes by posting the new policy on this page and updating the "Last updated" date.
privacy.s12Text: If you have questions about this Politika tal-Privatezza or wish to exercise your data rights, please contact us:

terms.title: Termini tas-Servizz
terms.s1Text: By accessing or using Uplift's workforce intelligence platform ("Service"), you agree to be bound by these Termini tas-Servizz ("Terms"). If you disagree with any part minn these terms, you may not access the Service.
terms.s2Text: Uplift provides a workforce intelligence SaaS platform Dak includes AI scheduling, Ħiliet tracking, Karriera path visibility, U Gamifikazzjoni features designed lil Għajnuna organizations manage their workforce Aktar effectively.
terms.s3Text1: When you create an account with us, you must provide accurate, complete, and current information. Failure to do so constitutes a breach minn these Terms, which may result in immediate termination minn your account.
terms.s3Text2: You are Responsabbli għal safeguarding your Password U għal Kollox activities Dak occur Taħt your Kont. You agree Mhux lil disclose your Password lil Kwalunkwe third party.
terms.s4Text: We take data protection seriously. Your use minn the Service is also governed by our Privacy Politika, which describes how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
terms.s5Item1: Use the Service għal Kwalunkwe unlawful purpose
terms.s5Item2: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part minn the Service
terms.s5Item3: Interfere B' Jew disrupt the Service Jew servers
terms.s5Item5: Aqsam account credentials with unauthorized users
terms.s6Text: The Service U its original content, features, U functionality are owned minn Uplift U are protected minn international Copyright, Trademark, U Oħrajn intellectual property laws.
terms.s7Text: Some parts minn the Service are billed on a subscription basis. You will be billed in advance on a recurring basis. Billing cycles are set on a monthly or annual basis, depending on your subscription plan.
terms.s8Text: We may terminate or suspend your account immediately, without prior notice or liability, for any reason, including breach minn these Terms. Upon termination, your right to use the Service will cease immediately.
terms.s9Text: In no event shall Uplift, its directors, impjegati, partners, or suppliers be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including loss minn prminnits, data, or goodwill.
terms.s10Text: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. We will provide notice minn any material changes by posting the new Terms on this page and updating the "Last updated" date.
terms.s11Text: Jekk you have Kwalunkwe questions about Dawn Termini, Jekk jogħġbok Kuntatt us f':
